title: Exchange rates
summary: 9708 A Level exchange rates — systems, PPP, and policy trade-offs beyond AS.
learningObjectives: Compare fixed, floating, and managed systems.
Analyse impossible trinity and policy choices.

simpleExplanation.title: A Level international finance
simpleExplanation.summary: Exchange rate systems affect trade, inflation, and monetary independence. A Level adds currency unions and capital flows.
steps: Depreciation improves competitiveness, may raise import prices.
Impossible trinity: pick two of fixed FX, free capital, independent monetary policy.

sections.content: **Exchange rates** (11.2) at **A Level** builds on **AS 6.4**. Focus on **systems** and **policy constraints**.

steps.caption: A Level: currency unions, managed bands, crawling pegs.
Purchasing power parity long-run tendency.
steps.embedHint: Same basket should cost same in PPP terms.

steps.caption: Interest rate differential affects capital flows and currency.
Impossible trinity: fixed FX, free capital, independent monetary policy.
